news.headline: Wispr Flow expands to Mac and Windows, offering voice dictation in every app, powered by AI. -San Francisco, March 12, 2025
news.summary: A new voice dictation technology that is compatible with all applications is now available on both Mac and Windows operating systems. This advanced system boasts faster and more reliable AI-powered communication. The company behind this innovation, Wispr, revealed the news today in San Francisco on March 12, 2025, highlighting their objective to create a more seamless and intuitive interaction with technology.

news.headline: AlphaSense exceeds $400M in annual recurring revenue, advancing with private content expansion and generative AI.
news.summary: The Market Intelligence Leader, AlphaSense, continues to experience momentum and rapid growth, achieving significant milestones in revenue, customers, product innovation, and industry recognition. Based on the latest figures, AlphaSense has seen a considerable increase in revenue, gaining traction with a growing number of customers. The platform's AI-powered market intelligence and search capabilities have been pivotal in this success. Notably, AlphaSense's innovative products have received positive industry recognition, further solidifying its position as a leader in the market intelligence sector.

news.headline: Israeli organizations revealed the 2025 Mental Health Innovation Landscape Map, highlighting tech companies.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on March 12, 2025, Startup Nation Central, in collaboration with the ICAR organization (Israel's Collective Action for Resilience) and Bezyl, introduced the landscape map for Israeli technology companies focusing on mental health for the year 2025. This comprehensive map showcases the significant developments in this sector and highlights the growth of innovative mental health tech solutions.

news.headline: Voting begins for the 12th LA2050 Grants Challenge in Los Angeles, $27 million distributed to nonprofits.
news.summary: The Goldhirsh Foundation's LA2050 Grants Challenge is now in its 12th iteration. With close to 900,000 votes tallied, a total of $27 million has been allocated to organizations making a meaningful impact. Commencing today in Los Angeles, the public voting phase for the latest LA2050 Grants initiative is set to begin.

news.headline: JLL Income Property Trust to hold Q4 2024 earnings call on March 19; has $6.6 billion in investments.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, JLL Income Property Trust announced their upcoming public earnings call scheduled for March 19, 2025. JLL Income Property Trust is a daily NAV REIT managed institutionally, listed under NASDAQ as ZIPTAX, ZIPTMX, ZIPIAX, and ZIPIMX. The trust currently manages a diverse portfolio of equity and debt investments amounting to around $6.6 billion. This earnings call will provide stakeholders and investors with insights into the trust's financial performance and outlook for the future.

news.headline: Mukul Bakhshi joins The Evaluation Company as Chief Legal and Compliance Officer, enhancing its advancements in education and assessment trends.
news.summary: In a press release dated March 12, 2025, The Evaluation Company (TEC) announced the appointment of Mukul Bakhshi, Esq., as its latest addition to the team, now holding the position of Chief Legal and Compliance Officer. With ambitions to lead in the face of changing landscapes within the education and assessment sectors regarding economics, technology, and politics, Mukul is set to play a crucial role in navigating these disruptions.

news.headline: "Griffin Catalyst presents American history through stage performances and TV productions in New York, Miami, and nationwide, focusing on World War I and II. Partners with American History Unbound for shows at Carnegie Hall and New World Center."
news.summary: Carnegie Hall and New World Center will witness a significant collaboration as they partner with American History Unbound for a compelling event. Titled "The Great War & The Great Gatsby," this event will vividly depict World War I using a combination of music and imagery. Furthermore, "The Eyes of the World: From D-Day to VE Day" will narrate the intense final year of World War II. Scheduled for March in Miami, these events promise to provide insights into the historical context of the wars through a captivating artistic experience.

news.headline: ModuleMD wows at AAAAI 2025, marking 25 years of excellence in allergy solutions, with new innovations.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in San Diego, ModuleMD marked 25 years of success in providing allergy practice solutions at AAAAI 2025. The event was not just a conference but a significant milestone for the company. ModuleMD, renowned in the field, presented its newest advancements, capturing the interest of numerous clinicians in attendance.

news.headline: Tencent Games to showcase innovative game technologies at GDC 2025. Leading platform for development, publishing and operations.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in San Francisco, Tencent Games, a global leader in game development, publishing, and operations, revealed plans to feature its cutting-edge game development technologies at the 2025 Game Developers Conference (GDC). This event serves as a platform for showcasing innovative advancements in the industry.

news.headline: WestExec Advisors adds Johnnie Kaberle as Senior VP, bringing deep policymaking expertise.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, it was reported that Johnnie Kaberle has recently been appointed as the Senior Vice President of WestExec Advisors, a prominent bipartisan strategic and geopolitical risk consulting company. Kaberle, a seasoned policymaker, brings extensive knowledge in congressional appropriations to the firm. This announcement marks a significant development for WestExec Advisors, solidifying their leadership team with Kaberle's appointment.

RFG Advisory commits to building future RIA with new technology partnerships & enhancements at annual Advisor Growth Retreat.
news.summary: A wealth management innovator, RFG Advisory, based in Birmingham, Alabama, revealed strategic partnerships and technology upgrades during its annual Advisor Growth Retreat. The firm aims to empower Independent Advisors and their clients by enhancing their integrated technology stack. Several new tech enhancements were announced at the retreat to support Independent Advisors in building their businesses without compromise.

news.headline: Egg prices soar by 10.4% in Feb despite lower inflation, as avian flu outbreak causes nationwide shortage.
news.summary: In February, the cost of the essential item surged by 10.4%, despite a slight decrease in general inflation. The ongoing outbreak of avian influenza further intensified a countrywide scarcity of eggs.

news.headline: OPTIMIZERx Corp. reported Q4 sales of $32.32M, up 14% YoY, gross profit $22M. Full-year revenue reached $92.1M, EBITDA $11.7M.
news.summary: Health care technology firm Optimizerx Corp. (NASDAQ: OPRX) posted fourth-quarter sales of $32.32 million, a 14% rise from the previous year, surpassing the projected $30.36 million. The company also exceeded expectations with an adjusted EPS of 30 cents, beating the forecasted 27 cents. Their full-year revenue saw a significant increase of 29% year-over-year, reaching $92.1 million. Gross profit for the fourth quarter rose by 23% to $22 million, and full-year gross profit amounted to $59.4 million. Adjusted EBITDA showed substantial growth, climbing 53% year-over-year in Q4 to $8.8 million, with full-year adjusted EBITDA at $11.7 million.

news.headline: Trump: We have gotten some positive messages on ceasefire.
Trump: It is up to Russia now.
Trump: We have people going to Russia now, I hope we can get a ceasefire.
Midco® partners with Telgoo5 and BlueConnects for mobile services development. President Ben Dold expresses excitement.
news.summary: In a significant move, Midco from Sioux Falls, South Dakota, has reached a crucial milestone in its mobile product development by finalizing delivery agreements with Telgoo5 and BlueConnects. The company's President and COO, Ben Dold, expressed enthusiasm about this new development, stating that they are excited to embark on a new phase in Midco's journey. The agreements mark a turning point for Midco as they gear up to provide top-notch mobile services to their customers. This strategic partnership is a pivotal moment for a company that has been steadily adapting to meet the evolving needs of its customers.

news.headline: Sumanth Sukumar, former executive at Coinbase and Uber, appointed as CTO of Altruist for tech advancement.
news.summary: Altruist, a custodian designed for RIAs, has named Sumanth Sukumar as the new Chief Technology Officer (CTO) in Los Angeles. Sumanth, experienced in building and expanding intricate technology systems, previously managed engineering teams at Coinbase, Uber, and Facebook. As CTO, he will focus on maintaining platform security and stability, driving innovation, and incorporating AI into internal systems and new offerings. The appointment aims to enhance technological capabilities and drive growth at Altruist.

news.headline: Dick's Sporting Goods reports Q4 beat with net sales growing 6.4% to $3,894 million, but disappoints with 2025 earnings guidance at $13.80-$14.40/share; stock under pressure.
news.summary: Shares of Dick’s Sporting Goods Inc (NYSE:DKS) fell despite reporting strong fourth-quarter results. Analysts adjusted price targets: Stifel reduced to $226, Telsey to $250, Goldman Sachs to $242, Wedbush remained at $215, and Guggenheim maintained a Neutral rating. Dick’s Q4 net sales rose 6.4% to $3,894 million, beating expectations. Earnings slightly missed projections, attributed to below-line items. Management's 2025 earnings projection was $13.80-$14.40/share, lower than estimates. Duffy highlighted inventory growth to boost spring '25 comp sales but poses markdown risks.

news.headline: VinFast VF 8 caters to urban and suburban lifestyles with impressive range, space, and features, introduced in Irvine, California.
news.summary: The demand for adaptable transportation is rising in the United States as people split their time between busy city hubs and tranquil suburban areas. The VinFast VF 8 is a reliable option for owners seeking practicality, boasting an extensive range, ample space, and numerous intelligent features. This versatile vehicle is gaining popularity among consumers, promising convenience and efficiency for their daily commuting needs.

news.headline: Tamela and David Mann announce 'The Live Breathe Fight Tour' featuring top artists, coming to cities nationwide in 2025.
news.summary: Supported by the Black Promoters Collective, the Live Breathe Fight Tour promises an unforgettable evening of worship, inspiration, and music as it travels to various cities across the nation. Scheduled to kick off on March 12, 2025, in Dallas, the event features acclaimed duo Tamela and David Mann, offering audiences a chance to engage with their faith and enjoy a night filled with soul-stirring music. Don't miss this opportunity to experience the magic of the Live Breathe Fight Tour, set to captivate audiences with its dynamic performances and heartfelt messages in cities nationwide.

news.headline: March editions of Supply Chain Digital, Procurement Magazine, and Manufacturing Digital by BizClik Media showcase insights from executives at top companies like DBS Bank, ABB, Google Cloud, DP World, RAK Ceramics, Boston Dynamics. London, March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In the recent releases of Supply Chain Digital, Procurement Magazine, and Manufacturing Digital, top executives from DBS Bank, ABB, Google Cloud, DP World, RAK Ceramics, Boston Dynamics, and other leading companies share their exclusive insights. The articles were published in LONDON on March 12, 2025, by BizClik, the UK's premier business publication. These features delve into the latest trends and strategies in the industry, providing valuable information for professionals.

news.headline: Martha Stewart launches new products in apparel, culinary, gardening, and home décor with QVC. Exclusive Martha Stewart Signature clothing line included.
news.summary: QVC®, a leading live social shopping company, has unveiled an exclusive apparel line named Martha Stewart Signature, drawing inspiration from Martha Stewart's elegant and easygoing style. This collaboration was announced in WEST CHESTER, Pa. on March 12, 2025, through a press release on PRNewswire. The collection is a result of a partnership between QVC® and Marquee Brands, a renowned global brand accelerator and owner of various popular brands.

news.headline: Global Urolithin A market valued at $37.9 million in 2023, expected to grow due to demand for health supplements.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, on March 12, 2025, it was reported that the Urolithin A Market is categorized by Type into two segments: Purity above 98% and Purity above 99%, and by Application into Food Additives, Cosmetics, and Drugs and Supplements. The Global Urolithin A Market, valued at USD 37.9 million in 2023, is projected to achieve a significant growth and reach USD [mention the new anticipated value].

news.headline: Study by Schneider Electric shows occupancy-based control cuts office energy use and emissions by 22%.
news.summary: A recent study by Schneider Electric based in Mississauga, Ontario, revealed that implementing occupancy-based controls in meeting rooms can lead to a notable 22% decrease in energy consumption and emissions.

news.headline: Pemex CEO: Mexico's reliance on US gas is a national security problem.
Trump: We are going to do reciprocal tariffs.
Trump: I am very happy that oil is down.
University of Detroit Mercy designated as Research University by ACE and Carnegie Foundation, aiding in its academic advancements.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, the University of Detroit Mercy (UDM) received recognition as a Research University from the American Council on Education (ACE) and the Carnegie Foundation for the Advancement of Teaching. This prestigious designation is a testament to UDM's commitment to research and innovation. The new status will elevate UDM's profile in the academic community and provide opportunities for increased collaboration and funding. This achievement underscores UDM's dedication to academic excellence and reflects its significant contributions to research and teaching.

news.headline: Trump: The EU has been very tough.
US Senator Cornyn: I am meeting with Trump tomorrow about renewing tax cuts.
Gracie Point Holdings launches GP Affluent Markets, an independent life insurance financing company.
news.summary: Gracie Point Holdings, LLC, a prominent life insurance premium finance provider, has introduced GP Affluent Markets, a separate entity focused on offering customized solutions. The launch took place in New York on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Nigeria's gift card market to reach $2.34 billion in 2025, expected to grow to $3.59 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 12.8%.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on the Nigeria gift card and incentive card market predicts significant growth in the industry. The market is projected to increase by 12.8% annually, reaching a value of US$2.34 billion by 2025. Between 2020 and 2024, the Nigerian gift card market demonstrated strong growth, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.4%. The upward trend is anticipated to persist, with experts forecasting continued expansion in the coming years. This data was included in the recent update of the report available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei: Negotiations with the current US government will not lead to the lifting of Iranian sanctions - State Media.
Mission Rock Residential to manage 200-unit apartment community in Chattanooga, Tennessee, built in 2018 by Hamilton Zanze.
news.summary: Mission Rock Residential, a well-known property management firm, has been chosen by Hamilton Zanze to oversee the operations of 1400 Chestnut, a mid-rise apartment complex with 200 units that was constructed in 2018 in Chattanooga, Tennessee. This collaboration signifies a significant step in the management of the property, showcasing the reputation and expertise of Mission Rock.

news.headline: Florida architecture firm acquired after 40 years by international company for continued growth, facilitated by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions.
news.summary: Viking Mergers & Acquisitions recently facilitated a deal in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on March 12, 2025. The deal involved the acquisition of a long-standing architectural firm that has been serving South Florida for almost four decades. The firm was purchased by an international holding company that focuses on architecture, engineering, and related services. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for both companies involved, demonstrating a strategic move in the industry. The architectural firm's extensive experience and client base in the region, combined with the resources and global reach of the acquiring company, are expected to create new opportunities for growth and expansion. The exact financial details of the deal, including the purchase price and other important numbers, have not been disclosed publicly.

news.headline: Violinist Cho-Liang Lin to perform Tchaikovsky Concerto with National Symphony Orchestra of Costa Rica on April 4 at Teatro Nacional, led by Grammy-winning conductor Giancarlo Guerrero.
news.summary: On April 4, 2025, renowned Grammy-winning conductor Giancarlo Guerrero will lead a significant concert at the Teatro Nacional in SAN JOSÉ. The performance will feature the internationally celebrated violinist Cho-Liang Lin collaborating with the National Symphony Orchestra of Costa Rica (OSNCR). This anticipated event promises a unique musical experience, showcasing exceptional talents.

news.headline: TerminalX enhances partnership with Syte to boost direct sales by double digits using AI-driven product discovery in competitive apparel e-commerce. NY, 3/12/25.
news.summary: To keep up with increasing consumer expectations for tailored shopping experiences, TerminalX is intensifying its focus on AI-driven discovery to remain competitive in the fast-paced world of online apparel retail. Based in Israel, TerminalX is currently enhancing its AI capabilities to cater to the rising demand for personalized services. The company's strategic move comes amidst the rapidly evolving eCommerce landscape as it aims to solidify its position as a prominent player in the market. The company's efforts reflect a growing trend in the industry where businesses are leveraging technology to enhance customer satisfaction and drive sales.

news.headline: Rivus Pharmaceuticals reports Phase 2a HuMAIN trial results of HU6 in patients with obesity-related heart failure in JAMA Cardiology.
news.summary: In a recent study, patients with obesity-related heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF) who received treatment with HU6 experienced notable decreases in body fat and abdominal visceral fat. This novel, once-daily oral therapy currently in Phase 2 clinical trials also helped in maintaining skeletal muscle. These findings highlight the potential of HU6 in addressing obesity-related HFpEF, showcasing its effectiveness in reducing body fat and visceral fat while preserving muscle mass.

news.headline: Inventor from Australia creates 797 793 CAT REAR STRUT JIG to simplify securing struts on large dump trucks.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025, an inventor from Proserpine, QLD, Australia discussed his innovation in making the maintenance of large rear dump trucks more efficient. The inventor introduced the 797 793 CAT REAR STRUT JIG aimed at streamlining the securing, moving, and replacement of struts on these trucks. The specially-designed steel jig showcased significant enhancements in the process.

news.headline: China is bracing for worst-case scenario under Trump administration. - Leland Miller.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has decreased to 4.2%, with a total of 6.7 million individuals finding employment in the past month. The country added 531,000 jobs, surpassing economists' expectations and marking a significant improvement in the labor market. This decrease in unemployment is a positive indicator of the economic recovery following the challenges posed by the global pandemic. However, there is still a need for continued efforts to support those who are unemployed and address any lingering effects on the workforce. The progress seen in the job market is encouraging, but experts emphasize the importance of sustained growth and policies to ensure long-term stability.

news.headline: Bybit USDT Festival offers 1.5 million USDT in prizes, celebrating financial innovation and engaging diverse users.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on March 12, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency globally, is commemorating financial innovation through the Bybit USDT Festival, which consists of various events designed for a broad range of users. Spanning from Bybit Card holders to experienced traders, individuals utilizing Bybit and members of the community are actively participating in the celebrations.

news.headline: Abu Dhabi firm MGX invests $2B in Binance for stablecoins, marking a major deal in industry. Binance claims over 260M users.
news.summary: Abu Dhabi-based investment firm MGX has made a $2 billion investment in cryptocurrency exchange Binance, one of the largest funding deals in the industry's history. This marks MGX's first foray into the cryptocurrency sector, focusing on emerging technology. Binance, the world's largest crypto exchange, has over 260 million registered users and offers 466 cryptocurrencies. The cryptocurrency venture capital funding is on the rise, with $1.11 billion raised by 137 companies in February alone, and a projected total funding of over $18 billion in 2025. Positive regulatory developments and favorable financing conditions are driving this growth. Despite a challenging macro environment, conditions are expected to improve with accelerating business cycles and increased global liquidity.

news.headline: Wang & Lee Group plans to distribute cryptocurrency dividends to shareholders based on profits and retained earnings.
news.summary: Hong Kong, 12 March 2025 - Wang & Lee Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: WLGS) announced plans to issue a cryptocurrency dividend to its shareholders once profits are achieved and dependent on retained earnings as per the Company’s audited financial statements released on 4 March 2025.
